svg.title: LitClock paper grain — DESIGN.md D6, hero card light-mode only
svg.desc: Hand-tuned fractal noise. baseFrequency 0.9 / numOctaves 2 yields fine paper-like grain. stitchTiles="stitch" makes the SVG tile seamlessly when used as a CSS background-image. The colorMatrix locks RGB to warm dark ink (≈ #1A1410 desaturated) and squeezes alpha to a 0..0.04 range so the perceived opacity sits at the 3–5% target without any wrapping rect-opacity multiplier. Consumer: hero card in light mode only.
